The '''''Gentleman Caller''''' was an [[Corellian runabout]] owned by [[Tendra Risant Calrissian]].

She purchased it hastily just before the onset of the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], when she noticed a suspicious buildup of [[Starship/Legends|ships]] around [[Sacorria]] that she deduced might be part of an invading fleet assembled by the [[Sacorrian Triad]]. Unfortunately, on her voyage to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to inform [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] of her suspicions, she got caught in the [[Star system/Legends|systemwide]] [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction field]] surrounding the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] and was unable to communicate through normal means because of jamming throughout the system. She traveled through the systems in normal [[Realspace/Legends|space]] for several weeks, until the field was shut off by [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]. The ''Gentleman Caller'' was then able to make the [[Hyperspace/Legends|jump]] and meet up with the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']].

*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1st}}
